query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN npc_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_npc, SUM(CASE WHEN learn_cost IS NULL OR learn_cost = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_cost FROM game_unified_skill_catalog WHERE usable_by_player = 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN npc_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_npc, SUM(CASE WHEN learn_cost IS NULL OR learn_cost = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_cost FROM game_unified_skill_catalog WHERE usable_by_player = 1
